item.title: Novenas you can start today - 01 July
item.description:
Blessed Arnold Of Camerino
Blessed Eumenios
Blessed Faustino Villanueva Villanueva
Blessed Marie Gertrude De Ripert Dalauzier
Blessed Nicholas Spira
Blessed Pacificus
Blessed Parthenios
Blessed Sylvie Agnes De Romillon
Martyrs Of Africa
Martyrs Of Antioch
Martyrs Of Damascus
Martyrs Of Nicopolis
Martyrs Of Nitria
Martyrs Of Tomis
Saint Amalburga
Saint Anatolia
Saint Anton Nguyen Huu Quynh
Saint Apollonius Of Sardis
Saint Bianor Of Pisidia
Saint Cuan Of Airbhre
Saint Elilantus
Saint Etto
Saint Knud
Saint Lantfrid
Saint Pascharius
Saint Peter Vincioli
Saint Phero Nguyen Khac Tu
Saint Rufina Of Rome
Saint Sylvanus Of Pisidia
Saint Victoria
Saint Waltram
Seven Holy Brothers

Feast Day: 10 July
Start Date: 01 July
End Date: 09 July
